creator: h.w.neff@gmail.com
text:
put "supported hardware" into search box, got things like:

Search Results
The archive www contains the following items relevant to `supported hardware':

    http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/install-supported-hardware.html
    Score: 230; Lines: 79; -6-2013; Archive: www

    http://www.freebsd.org/relnotes/CURRENT/hardware/pc98/support-sys.html
    Score: 214; Lines: 95; --; Archive: www

    http://www.freebsd.org/relnotes/6-STABLE/hardware/pc98/support-sys.html
    Score: 214; Lines: 95; --; Archive: www

tried several of those links and consistently got "page not found" error dialogue

How-To-Repeat: put "supported hardware" into search box, hit "search"
follow resulting links
